verse_text: For we are His workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared beforehand that we should walk in them.

pericope.title: The Former Alienation of the Gentiles

links.context: Our salvation and calling are based on His grace and love, not on anything we have done to merit God's favor ([[EPH.2:8]]-10; [[TIT.3:5]], [[TIT.3:6]]).
